title: emericia pergularia
intro: Emericia pergularia, also known as the "Kare Kare" or "Kare-kare" plant, is a type of shrub native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat a range of health conditions. The plant has been used to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, offering relief from pain and discomfort. Emericia pergularia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs in traditional folk remedies.
